hero_subtitle: SFTY helps regulatory teams connect stablecoin issuer data, transaction monitoring, risk signals and reporting into one evidence-ready supervisory workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market

problem_title: Supervision slows when stablecoin data fragments
problem_description: Regulators struggle to form a clear market view when issuer, transaction and wallet information remain siloed across multiple sources. This fragmentation hampers timely risk detection, evidence collection and smooth supervisory reporting within a unified workflow.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY integrates issuer profiles, wallet activity, transaction signals and risk alerts into a unified supervisory workflow that supports case management, evidence logging and reporting for stablecoin regulators.
workflow_title: From stablecoin signal to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY connects stablecoin issuer data, transaction activity, alerts, cases and evidence to support structured supervisory reviews and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. One supervisory layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects stablecoin issuer data, transaction signals, cases and reports into a unified supervisory layer that moves beyond isolated wallet analytics and fragmented oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY supports regulators with secure deployment, evidence-grade logging, role-based access and procurement-safe architecture for comprehensive stablecoin supervision workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for stablecoin supervision?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a supervisory layer that connects issuer data, wallets, transactions, risk signals and reporting workflows to support comprehensive stablecoin oversight by public authorities.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY monitor stablecoin transactions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY monitors stablecoin activity by linking transaction flows, wallet eligibility and issuer exposure to licensing records and risk signals within a connected supervisory workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve supervisory evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by maintaining audit logs, decision records, case history and supporting documentation to support supervisory reviews and reporting are evidence-ready.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing oversight tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can integrate multiple provider outputs and government systems, enabling controlled access and secure data governance within regulated environments.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing analytics and compliance tools, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying providers.
final_title: Structure stablecoin supervision into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects issuer data, transaction signals and reporting into a secure, evidence-ready supervisory environment.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
